title: RECPDCL Senior Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: REC Power Development and Consultancy Limited (RECPDCL)
short_info: REC Power Development and Consultancy Limited (RECPDCL) Recruitment 2026: REC Power Development and Consultancy Limited has released the official notification for 3 Senior Executive (Tech.)-Lead Verifier posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Across India. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid PSU jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 48 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 Years OBC-NCL: 3 Years PwBD: 10 years (in addition to applicable category relaxation)

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Engineering/Technology or Bachelor of Science with relevant experience.
qualification.details: Senior Executive (Tech.)-Lead Verifier (Compliance): As per The Bureau of Energy Efficiency (Qualification for Accredited Energy Auditors and Maintenance of the List) Regulations, 2010 with 13 years of experience. Senior Executive (Tech.)- Lead Verifier (Offset): Engineering Graduate (Bachelor of Engineering/Bachelor of Technology) or equivalent (Or) Bachelor of Science or equivalent with 13 years out of which min. 5 years' experience in validation and/or verification activity as team member in CDM or VCM activities.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1,35,000/- per month plus other benefits.

selection_process: Shortlisted Candidates shall be called for Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RECPDCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
